title: JUMPm: A Tool for Large-Scale Identification of Metabolites in Untargeted Metabolomics.
author: Wang X Cho JH Poudel S Li Y Jones DR Shaw TI Tan H Xie B Peng J
content: S-EPMC7281133 PMC7281133 JUMPm: A Tool for Large-Scale Identification of Metabolites in Untargeted Metabolomics.
